reference_sql: WITH ranked AS (  SELECT netuid, uid, hotkey, stake, emission,     emission / NULLIF(stake, 0) AS efficiency,     ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY netuid ORDER BY emission / NULLIF(stake, 0) DESC) AS rn   FROM validators   WHERE stake > 0) SELECT netuid, uid, hotkey, stake, emission, efficiency FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY netuid, efficiency DESC
